description: Product page with real brew parameters in marketing text — low-confidence extraction
sourceText:
Source title:
Ethiopia Yirgacheffe — Single Origin Light Roast

Page text:
Ethiopia Yirgacheffe — Single Origin Light Roast
by Onyx Coffee Lab

Tasting Notes: Blueberry, Jasmine, Bergamot
Process: Washed
Region: Gedeb, Yirgacheffe
Altitude: 1,900-2,100 masl
Varietal: Heirloom

This coffee is perfect for pour-over. We recommend 15g of coffee to 250g of water at around 96°C for a clean, sweet cup. Grind medium-fine.

Our roasters cup this coffee daily and it consistently scores 88+ points. The floral aromatics and bright berry acidity make it one of our most popular offerings.

Available in 250g and 1kg bags. Roasted to order every Tuesday and Friday. Free shipping on orders over $40.

Subscribe and save 15%! Use code POUROVER at checkout.

Source URL:
https://onyxcoffeelab.com/products/ethiopia-yirgacheffe
